title: Coding Prompts, Scoped Edits, and Regression Control · Evaluation Brief: Test Expectation
summary: Implement a repository change with tests and minimal unrelated churn. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt test expectation increment in a coding-agent implementation brief. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Specify risk-proportionate tests and observable regression checks.
Ground implementation in repository commands, architecture, dependency policy, and local instructions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
